Compliance & AML

Anti-money laundering (AML) screening, sanction list checks, and transaction monitoring.

Screening Lists

UN Sanctions
OFAC SDN
EU Sanctions
UK Sanctions
Interpol
Local Blacklist
PEP Database

Endpoints

POST
/compliance/screen

Screen a subject against sanction lists

POST
/compliance/monitor

Monitor a transaction

GET
/compliance/screenings

List screenings

GET
/compliance/monitoring

List monitored transactions

PUT
/compliance/screenings/{id}/review

Review a flagged screening

Screen a Subject

POST /compliance/screen
1curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/compliance/screen \
2  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_..." \
3  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
4  -d '{
5    "subjectType": "merchant",
6    "subjectId": "m_abc123",
7    "subjectName": "John Doe",
8    "subjectCountry": "NG"
9  }'

Risk Scoring

Risk Score0 = Safe  ·  100 = High Risk
0-25
Low Risk
25-50
Flagged
50-100
High Risk
